markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 3. REGISTRATION OF VEHICLES AND CERTIFICATES OF TITLE [4000 - 9808]
### Chapter 1. Original and Renewal of Registration; Issuance of Certificates of Title [4000 - 5506]
#### Article 10. Registration of Trailer Coaches [5350 - 5354]
##### § 5350

The provisions of this division shall apply to trailer coaches except as otherwise provided in this article.

*(Amended by Stats. 1981, Ch. 975, Sec. 35.)*

subsections.text: The provisions of this division shall apply to trailer coaches except as otherwise provided in this article.
